when_to_run: Before relying on any canonical run for governance
required_inputs: Repo execution rules; path precedence; runnable script contracts
required_checks: No shadowed paths; execution signals; plumbing-only fixes documented
required_outputs: Stability notes or equivalent maintenance artifacts
blocks: G4 dataset trust, G3, H, I0, I1, I, J, K, L, cross-module
notes: Foundational; overlaps with completed plumbing work in places.

when_to_run: After consolidation path exists; with or after G4
required_inputs: aging_observable_dataset.csv; consolidation status; pointer/manifests where applicable
required_checks: Five-column contract; lineage; multi-Tp x tw handling documented
required_outputs: Validation artifacts as per project (e.g. consolidation reports)
blocks: G3, H, I0, I1, I, J, K, L, cross-module

gate_name: G3 tau-chain run and artifact generation
required_inputs: aging_Tp_tw_aggregate_inventory.csv; aging_Tp_tw_consolidation_status.csv; upstream tau dependency audit artifacts
required_checks: Tau producer scripts execute on current aggregate lineage; required tau/correlation artifacts generated and indexed
required_outputs: Updated tau/correlation artifact tables and run reports
blocks: H, I0, I1, I, J, K, L, cross-module
notes: Sequencing gate; not a substitute for I0 forensic survey.

gate_name: G4 multi-Tp x tw coverage and consolidation
when_to_run: After inventory-driven export driver is available
required_checks: Coverage inventory-derived; ragged Tp x tw row-wise; five-column contract with lineage
blocks: G3, H, I0, I1, I, J, K, L, cross-module

when_to_run: After G3 and G4; before I0
required_checks: Stability and sensitivity documented; failure modes bounded
required_outputs: Robustness report set; decision note for I0 entry
blocks: I0, I1, I, J, K, L, cross-module
notes: May be PARTIAL or YES depending on latest run verdicts.

when_to_run: After H sufficient to contextualize new outputs; before I1 and before J
required_inputs: Old reports; tables; scripts; figures under results/reports; current canonical artifacts
required_checks: Themes and attempted claims identified; grouped by physical theme; quantitative vs diagnostic vs legacy; canonical replacements vs replay vs quarantine vs retire
blocks: I1, I, J, K, L, cross-module
notes: Relaxation lesson: technical canonicalization alone is insufficient without reconstructed old-analysis intent. Replay plan CSV may be drafted in I0 and finalized in I1.

when_to_run: After I0 outputs exist; before I and before J
required_inputs: I0 theme inventory; physics survey; current canonical run index
required_checks: Each theme mapped to KEEP_CANONICAL REPLAY_REQUIRED DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY QUARANTINE_LEGACY RETIRE DEFER_TO_PAPER2 UNKNOWN_NEEDS_REVIEW; no J until plan exists
notes: Do not write physical synthesis until I0 and I1 exist.

when_to_run: After I0 and I1; robustness sufficient
required_inputs: I0/I1 artifacts; aging_observable_dataset.csv; lineage; manifests; robustness outputs
required_checks: No hidden assumptions; Track A/B; consolidation contract; ragged coverage; lineage; I0/I1 alignment; artifact-backed claims
required_outputs: Canonical review decision record and closure checklist

when_to_run: Only after I0 PASS, I1 PASS, and I = PASS
required_inputs: I0 closure; I1 plan acceptance; I closure; canonical artifacts
required_checks: Physical meaning; old vs new; survive/weaken/drop; Paper 1 vs deferred
required_outputs: Physical synthesis document with claim boundaries
notes: Blocked until I0 I1 I all pass.

required_checks: Allowed/forbidden claims; caveats; old-to-new mapping from I0/I1
required_outputs: Repository documentation package for Aging claims

when_to_run: Always enforced until all prerequisites met
required_inputs: I0 complete; I1 accepted; I PASS; J documented; K as required; Switching ready; Relaxation ready; approved cross-module plan
required_checks: No premature Aging x Switching or Aging x Relaxation work
notes: Aging synthesis/docs path plus peer modules plus plan.
